Elements/iframe/unsafe-url.name: unsafe-url
Elements/iframe/unsafe-url.description: The referrer will include the originandthe path (but not thefragment,password, orusername).This value is unsafe, because it leaks origins and paths from TLS-protected resources to insecure origins.
